column1: I'd only____________the washing-up for a few minutes when Clare came home, so she offered to finish it.

Gail hadn't___________me that she would help me, so I wasn't angry when she didn't.
Mum had___________her cup of tea from several minutes before she realised it had salt in it.
We'd____________ready all day when they called to say the party had been cancelled.
